channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The incidence of early-onset metastatic adenocarcinoma may be higher among patients with multiple metastatic sites and peritoneal involvement
item.description: 1. Incidence of early-onset metastatic adenocarcinoma increased among patients with multiple metastatic sites and those with peritoneum involvement. 2...

item.title: Photopenia on [18F]FDG PET/CT Predicts Benign Renal Lesions
item.description: Photopenia in high CT density renal lesions on [18F]FDG PET/CT scans shows a high negative predictive value for excluding malignancy. Medscape News UK

item.title: How the brain recovers from noise-induced damage
item.description: When a sound stops, our auditory system generates a precise "offset" response that marks this moment. This enables the brain to measure the duration o...

item.title: How unhealthy ultra‑processed foods are designed and marketed to make us crave them
item.description: Consumption of ultra-processed foods—including soft drinks, snacks and ready meals—is growing worldwide, despite evidence they are unhealthy.
